filesystem.description: Filesystem MCP — read/write QA artifacts and local context files

atlassian.description: Atlassian Rovo MCP — fetch Jira/Confluence context via OAuth when context/jira.token is not provided

azure-devops.description: Azure DevOps MCP — fetch work items via interactive auth when context/azure.pat is not provided. Replace YOUR_ORG with your organization name or read it from context/azure.config
